notes: Real HPV altura compilation: 18 standalone 'CHEQUEO DE ARNÉS DE SEGURIDAD' (F-CRS-LCH-03) forms bound into one PDF, each stamped 'Página 1 de 1' (verified by rendering pages 1, 2 — distinct workers per page). V4 counts 18 documents: 14 read directly, 4 recovered by Dempster-Shafer inference. The lightweight corner_count helper recovered only 13 of these 18 — the evidence that motivated the V4 engine swap.
